actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Facility A-13 went dark six hours ago.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Sweep the access corridor and recover any surviving logs.

OPS LOG 04
Power loss started in the maintenance wing.
Do not let the chanting spread beyond Sector C.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Corridor secure. The blackout did not stop the transmissions.
